name: TestWaitForEthernetLinkStatus
title: TestWaitForEthernetLinkStatus
syntax: long TestWaitForEthernetLinkStatus(long channel, long status, dword aTimeout); // form 1
long TestWaitForEthernetLinkStatus(long channel, Int64 hwChannel, long status, dword aTimeout); // form 2
long TestWaitForEthernetLinkStatus(ethernetport hwport, long status, dword aTimeout); // form 3
description: Waits for the occurrence of the specified Ethernet link status. Should the Ethernet link status not occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless. If the Ethernet link has already the expected state, the function returns immediately with return value 1.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Wait for this status: 0 = link down 1 = link up

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms] (Transmission of 0: no timeout controlling).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
